forager.agents.message

Class RessourceMessage

  • java.lang.Object
    • forager.agents.message.MessageContent
      • forager.agents.message.RessourceMessage

  • public final class RessourceMessage
extends MessageContent
    Message used to give ressource.
    Author:
    Guillaume Desquesnes

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      String item
      Ressource item type.
      int quantity
      Quantity of ressource in the message.
      boolean reply
      Weither the message is a reply.

    • Constructor Detail

      • RessourceMessage

        public RessourceMessage(AgentInfo sender,
                String item,
                int quantity)
        Create a ressource message.
        Parameters:
        sender - Info on the sender.
        item - The item type.
        quantity - The item quantity.

      • RessourceMessage

        public RessourceMessage(AgentInfo sender,
                String item,
                int quantity,
                boolean reply)
        Create a ressource message who may be a give back.
        Parameters:
        sender - Info on the sender.
        item - The item type.
        quantity - The item quantity.
        reply - True if the message is a give back.
